findings.problem: The chapter spine says Martha and Prue both begin to feel Owen slipping out of their emotional scale, but Prue exits before the decisive confrontation and her turn is mostly inferred from one correction, one look, and Martha's later summary. That leaves the chapter's social consequence narrower than its own three-way setup and keeps the fallout below award-level fullness.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the Prue beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:149, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:171, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:179 so her changed reading of Owen is legible in her own register before she leaves, or keep her present past snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:193 long enough to register the break directly instead of outsourcing it to Martha at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:321.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if a reader can point to at least one revised Prue beat before she exits that directly shows her changed judgment of Owen without relying on Martha's report at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:321; fail if Prue's side of the fracture still has to be inferred secondhand after the scene is over.

findings.problem: The prose explains Owen's warped emotional scale too many times before Martha names the damage. By the time she says she wanted him not to answer her fear 'like a timetable,' the narration has already restated the same diagnosis in several nearby forms, which blunts the sting of the corridor exchange.
findings.rewrite_direction: Differentiate or trim the explanatory interior at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:91, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:239, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:269 so each passage does separate work instead of rephrasing the same scale problem. Let Martha's confrontation at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:303 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:307 carry the sharpest articulation.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, on a straight reread, each revised interior beat introduces a distinct pressure rather than another paraphrase of Owen's altered scale, and Martha's line at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_08.md:307 lands as new damage rather than a restatement. Fail if two or more of those revised spans still describe the same diagnosis in only slightly different wording.

summary: Strong kitchen-and-corridor construction with clean continuity, close-third control, and distinct Owen/Martha/Prue/Tallow voices. The chapter passes craft and dialogue, but it stays below award level because Prue's half of the relational break is under-dramatized, and it fails prose because the narration restates Owen's emotional mis-scaling before Martha's confrontation can land at full force.
